calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-04-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, August 4, 2016 in Department 525:
Karen M. Oliverira, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness James Leighton.
Anthony Lepe, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona with witness Judy Lepe

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Karen M. Oliveira testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - Package exhibits - Original Car Title Certificate, Gene's Auto repair estimate, coolant & smog inspection invoices, work order & payment receipt, health & safety code print out, DMV smog information, vehicle code print out, and Vehicle test history.

Appellant/Defendant, Anthony Lepe testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - Various exhibits - written sales agreement dated 11/8/2015, 2015 T-Mobile Text messages from Karen Oliveira to Tony Lepe, 1/11/16 Gene's Auto Repair estimates, and letter from Karen Oliveira to Anthony & Judy Lepe.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence are retained. Original Car Title Certificate is returned to respondent.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-03-2016 Judgment Entered
